steps.title: Identify the parallel structure
steps.content: The pineapple's structure is “no longer identical to” its wild ancestor. The sentence about summer squash uses “also,” signaling the same type of relationship. The evidence confirms this: humans bred the squash from hard/bitter to soft/mild.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Varies from means is different from—precisely the relationship shown between domesticated and wild forms.

The other choices fail: helps with implies assistance, argues with suggests confrontation, reacts to describes a response rather than difference.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
